description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a shrimp, featuring a segmented body with a distinct cephalothorax and elongated abdomen. The exoskeleton is semi-translucent with a mix of brown, pink, and gray hues, and the surface appears slightly glossy and moist. The shrimp has multiple pairs of slender walking legs and two long, thin antennae extending from the head. The tail is fan-shaped and displays subtle color gradations, while the head region includes small, dark eyes set on short stalks. The overall form is streamlined, with a gentle curve along the body and fine details visible in the legs and antennae. This object would be found in food-related urban contexts, such as markets or restaurants.
description: A detailed, lifelike shrimp with a segmented body, long antennae, and multiple legs, featuring a glossy, semi-translucent exoskeleton in brown and pink tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the shrimp's curved body, segmented tail, and legs, with antennae extending forward.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the symmetry of the body, the spread of the tail, and the full length of the antennae.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the shrimp's legs and body curvature visible, but antennae extending in the opposite direction.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the ventral side, arrangement of legs, and the underside of the tail, with antennae visible.
